'''âs-p-s''' ('''kasapas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:limple|limple]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:limple|limple]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-p-s
|-
! Lemma
| kasapas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisapas|thisapas]] || [[word:jisapas|jisapas]] || [[word:shisapas|shisapas]] || [[word:kisapas|kisapas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusapas|thuthusapas]] || [[word:jujusapas|jujusapas]] || [[word:shushusapas|shushusapas]] || [[word:kukusapas|kukusapas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusapas|thusapas]] || [[word:jusapas|jusapas]] || [[word:shusapas|shusapas]] || [[word:kusapas|kusapas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusapas|thusapas]] || [[word:jusapas|jusapas]] || [[word:shusapas|shusapas]] || [[word:kusapas|kusapas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesapas|thesapas]] || [[word:jesapas|jesapas]] || [[word:shesapas|shesapas]] || [[word:kesapas|kesapas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosapas|thothosapas]] || [[word:jojosapas|jojosapas]] || [[word:shoshosapas|shoshosapas]] || [[word:kokosapas|kokosapas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosapas|thosapas]] || [[word:josapas|josapas]] || [[word:shosapas|shosapas]] || [[word:kosapas|kosapas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosapas|thosapas]] || [[word:josapas|josapas]] || [[word:shosapas|shosapas]] || [[word:kosapas|kosapas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsapas|thĂŠsapas]] || [[word:jĂŠsapas|jĂŠsapas]] || [[word:shĂŠsapas|shĂŠsapas]] || [[word:kĂŠsapas|kĂŠsapas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasapas|thathasapas]] || [[word:jajasapas|jajasapas]] || [[word:shashasapas|shashasapas]] || [[word:kakasapas|kakasapas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasapas|thasapas]] || [[word:jasapas|jasapas]] || [[word:shasapas|shasapas]] || [[word:kasapas|kasapas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasapas|thasapas]] || [[word:jasapas|jasapas]] || [[word:shasapas|shasapas]] || [[word:kasapas|kasapas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasapas|shasapas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasapas|goshasapas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasapas|gokishasapas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasapasnĂŒ|shasapasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasapasnknĂŒ|goshasapasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasapasnĂŒ|gokishasapasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasapashĂ«|shasapashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasapasnkshĂ«|goshasapasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasapashĂ«|gokishasapashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasapasro|shasapasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasapasnkro|goshasapasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasapasro|gokishasapasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasapasmu|shasapasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasapasnkmu|goshasapasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasapasmu|gokishasapasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasapasher|shasapasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasapasnksher|goshasapasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasapasher|gokishasapasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasapasng|shasapasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasapasnkng|goshasapasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasapasng|gokishasapasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasapasya|shasapasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasapasnkya|goshasapasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasapasya|gokishasapasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasapasyam|shasapasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasapasnkyam|goshasapasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasapasyam|gokishasapasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasapasnĂŒshĂ«|shasapasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasapasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasapasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasapasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasapasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasapasnĂŒro|shasapasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasapasnknĂŒro|goshasapasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasapasnĂŒro|gokishasapasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasapasnĂŒmu|shasapasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasapasnknĂŒmu|goshasapasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasapasnĂŒmu|gokishasapasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasapashĂ«nĂŒ|shasapashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasapasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasapasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasapashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasapashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasapashĂ«ro|shasapashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasapasnkshĂ«ro|goshasapasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasapashĂ«ro|gokishasapashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasapashĂ«mu|shasapashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasapasnkshĂ«mu|goshasapasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasapashĂ«mu|gokishasapashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasapasronĂŒ|shasapasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasapasnkronĂŒ|goshasapasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasapasronĂŒ|gokishasapasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasapasroshĂ«|shasapasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasapasnkroshĂ«|goshasapasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasapasroshĂ«|gokishasapasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasapasromu|shasapasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasapasnkromu|goshasapasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasapasromu|gokishasapasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasapasmunĂŒ|shasapasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasapasnkmunĂŒ|goshasapasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasapasmunĂŒ|gokishasapasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasapasmushĂ«|shasapasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasapasnkmushĂ«|goshasapasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasapasmushĂ«|gokishasapasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasapasmuro|shasapasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasapasnkmuro|goshasapasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasapasmuro|gokishasapasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
